description: Philippine diversified retailer operating supermarkets, convenience stores, and department stores under the Robinsons banner across the Philippines.

name: Grupo Éxito

description: Colombia's leading retail group operating Éxito supermarkets and Carulla premium stores, with additional operations in Uruguay and Argentina.

name: Sandfire Resources

description: Australian copper miner operating the MATSA copper complex in Spain and the Motheo mine in Botswana, targeting the energy transition copper demand surge.

description: Canada-listed owner of the Bisie tin mine in eastern DRC, the world's highest-grade operating tin mine and a significant global supply source for this critical electronics mineral.

description: Canada-incorporated lithium producer operating the Grota do Cirilo hard-rock lithium project in Minas Gerais, Brazil, with production sold to Asian battery manufacturers.

description: Canada-listed copper producer operating the MCSA copper complex and NX Gold mine in Brazil's Bahia state, targeting growing energy transition demand for copper.

description: Canadian copper explorer developing the Warintza porphyry copper project in Ecuador, one of the highest-grade undeveloped large-scale copper discoveries in the Americas.

name: Tronox Holdings

description: US-listed vertically integrated titanium dioxide manufacturer mining mineral sands in Australia and South Africa and processing pigment at global facilities.

description: Irish-listed mineral sands mining company operating the Moma mine in northern Mozambique, one of the world's largest producers of ilmenite, zircon, and rutile.

description: UK-listed gold mining company operating the high-grade Blanket Mine in Zimbabwe and developing gold properties in southern Africa.

name: Endeavour Mining

description: London-incorporated, TSX-listed West African gold miner operating multiple mines across Senegal, Ivory Coast, Burkina Faso, and Mali.

description: Australian gold mining company operating three producing mines in Ghana and Ivory Coast and developing the Meyas Sand gold project in Sudan.

description: London-listed precious metals miner operating high-grade underground silver and gold mines in Peru and Argentina.

description: Australian rare earth miner operating the Mount Weld mine in Western Australia and processing rare earth concentrate into separated products in Malaysia and the US.

description: Canadian copper miner operating the Mantoverde and Santo Domingo projects in Chile and the Cozamin mine in Mexico targeting copper supply for energy transition demand.

description: Indian state-owned defence electronics company producing radar systems, sonar, electronic warfare equipment, and communications systems for the Indian military and export customers.

description: India's national carrier and largest state-owned shipping company operating tankers, bulk carriers, and container vessels on international routes, with heavy Middle East crude oil trade exposure.

description: India's largest integrated port and logistics company operating 13 domestic ports plus overseas facilities in Israel, Sri Lanka, Tanzania, and Myanmar, making it the leading proxy for Indian Ocean trade flows.
